message:
fix(dog): escalate session-start failure + verify work assignment delivery

Roll back work assignment when session start fails (preventing zombie dogs),
add work read-back verification, and escalate failures.

Fix-merged from PR #2749 (stripped .beads contamination).
PR: https://github.com/steveyegge/gastown/pull/2749
